description: A deep link that navigates straight to a protected screen without checking authentication or validating parameters.
body: Failure mode: a deep/universal link routes directly to a gated destination, assuming the user is logged in and the parameters are trusted, so it can expose protected content or be exploited via tampered values. Detection signals: opening the link while logged out reaches the screen; parameters are used unvalidated; no auth gate in the link handler. Do not navigate to protected targets from a link without auth and parameter checks. Safer fallback: validate and sanitize link parameters, gate protected routes behind authentication with a redirect to login, and test cold-start and logged-out link entry.
